summary: Canary cannot complete today: llama_model_load_from_file hangs during the SYCL S1-PRELOAD weight stage before any determinism measurement can run.

evidence.what_this_would_test_when_unblocked: determinism of llama_state_get_size across (a) two identical sequential context creations and (b) pre vs post a single-token decode on one context; Mistral 7B Q4_0 and optional GPT-OSS 20B at n_ctx=4096
